tasks.subject: Task 0: deps + station_means aggregation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add matplotlib/contextily; pure per-station mean helper joined to coordinates.

**Files:** pyproject.toml, src/smoke_sense/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["pyproject.toml", "src/smoke_sense/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["station_means station_id/lat/lon/mean", "filters metric, joins stations", "empty range -> empty frame"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: renderer abstraction + MatplotlibRenderer + mean_map
tasks.description:
**Goal:** MapRenderer registry + matplotlib(+contextily) PNG renderer + mean_map orchestrator.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/visualize.py, tests/test_visualize.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/visualize.py", "tests/test_visualize.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["get_renderer matplotlib; unknown raises", "matplotlib basemap=False writes PNG", "mean_map path or None"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: visualize sub-app + mean-map subcommand
tasks.description:
**Goal:** visualize Typer sub-app; mean-map subcommand wired to visualize.mean_map; register in bin/__init__.

**Files:** src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py, src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py, tests/test_visualize_cli.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_visualize_cli.py -v` then `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/bin/visualize.py", "src/smoke_sense/bin/__init__.py", "tests/test_visualize_cli.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_visualize_cli.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mean-map writes PNG", "invalid fips/metric/renderer non-zero", "empty data no-data message"]}
```
